sections.paragraph:
Original: כּבד כּבוד

Transliteration: kâbôd kâbôd

Phonetic: kaw-bode'

BDB Definition:

  1. glory, honour, glorious, abundance
    1. abundance, riches
    2. honour, splendour, glory
    3. honour, dignity
    4. honour, reputation
    5. honour, reverence, glory
    6. glory

Origin: from H3513

TWOT entry: 943d,943e

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
